scripts.dev: start /B npm run dev:user & start /B npm run dev:order & start /B npm run dev:host & start /B npm run dev:system
scripts.build: npm -w apps/app-user run build & npm -w apps/app-order run build & npm -w apps/app-system run build & wait & npm -w apps/host run build
scripts.build:subs: npm -w apps/app-user run build & npm -w apps/app-order run build & npm -w apps/app-system run build
